command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== LIVE NETWORK STATE OF RUNNER ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 "
RUNNER_PID=\$(pgrep -f 'job-20260625T123626Z' 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "\$RUNNER_PID" ]; then
    echo "Runner PID: \$RUNNER_PID"
    echo "Network connections:"
    ss -tp 2>/dev/null | grep \$RUNNER_PID
    echo "Open files (network):"
    ls -la /proc/\$RUNNER_PID/fd 2>/dev/null | grep socket | head -5
    echo "CPU time:"
    ps -p \$RUNNER_PID -o pid,pcpu,pmem,etime,comm 2>/dev/null
else
    echo 'Runner process not found'
fi
" 2>&1

echo '=== OLLAMA PS (active inference) ==='
curl -s http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/ps 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
for m in d.get('models',[]):
    print('3090:', m.get('name'), 'expires:', m.get('expires_at','?'))
"
curl -s http://192.168.0.106:11434/api/ps 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
for m in d.get('models',[]):
    print('3060:', m.get('name'), 'expires:', m.get('expires_at','?'))
"

echo DONE_1940
